MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Continued To Jun-25-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ALLEGRA COHEN'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

Appearances via Zoom:
Robert White of Skootsky & Der LLP (415.979.9800, rwhite@skootskyder.com) for plaintiff and moving party;
Macey Olave of Gibson Dunn & Crutcher LLP (415.393.8200, MOlave@gibsondunn.com) for defendant and responding party.
